prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, controlled pacing with deliberate cuts and extended holds.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A pale dusk light rests on the robed crucified figure while the crowd in the foreground reads as dark silhouetted backs; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout. Keep the painted light exactly as it is, steady, with no added glow.

Scene contains:
The dark backs and raised arms of a jeering crowd fill the foreground, and beyond them the crucified Christ stands on a wooden cross, robed, a crown of thorns on his bowed head, arms outstretched along the beam. A distant cross stands on the far hill against a pale dusk sky. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the jeering crowd backs in foreground, the crucified figure beyond.

Cut to mid framing — the crucified Christ on the cross beyond the crowd.

Cut to close-up — the bowed head crowned with thorns.

Cut to insert — a raised jeering arm in the foreground.

Cut to insert — a dark turned back and shoulder.

Cut to upper framing — the distant cross on the far hill against the dusk sky.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the silent crucified figure beyond the loud crowd.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Loud scorn against quiet majesty.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — jeering crowd backs in foreground, crucified figure beyond
Cut to mid framing — crucified Christ on the cross beyond the crowd
Cut to close-up — the bowed head crowned with thorns
Cut to insert — a raised jeering arm in the foreground
Cut to insert — a dark turned back and shoulder
Cut to upper framing — distant cross on the far hill against the dusk sky
Return to full composition, end hold on the silent crucified figure beyond the crowd
